meta.summary: Official PfamScan 1.6 pfam_scan.pl runtime for scanning protein FASTA sequences against user-provided Pfam HMM libraries.
meta.description: Official PfamScan 1.6 pfam_scan.pl runtime for scanning protein FASTA sequences against user-provided Pfam HMM libraries.

test: grep -F 'my $VERSION = "1.6"' /opt/pfam_scan/pfam_scan.pl >/dev/null && pfam_scan.pl -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'pfam_scan.pl: search a FASTA file against a library of Pfam HMMs' >/dev/null && hmmscan -h 2>&1 | grep -F '# HMMER 3.4' >/dev/null && translate -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'translate' >/dev/null
perl -I/opt/pfam_scan -MBio::Pfam::Scan::PfamScan -MBio::Seq::RichSeq -MIPC::Run -MJSON -e 'print "pfam perl deps ok\n"' | grep -Fx 'pfam perl deps ok' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-pfam-scan-smoke && pfam_scan.pl -fasta /opt/pfam_scan/test-fixtures/query.fa -dir /opt/pfam_scan/test-fixtures/pfamdb -cpu 1 -outfile /tmp/taf-pfam-scan-smoke/result.txt >/tmp/taf-pfam-scan-smoke/run.log 2>&1 && test -s /tmp/taf-pfam-scan-smoke/result.txt && grep -F 'pfam_scan.pl' /tmp/taf-pfam-scan-smoke/result.txt >/dev/null && grep -F 'smoke_gene' /tmp/taf-pfam-scan-smoke/result.txt >/dev/null && grep -F 'PF99999.1' /tmp/taf-pfam-scan-smoke/result.txt >/dev/null && grep -F 'PFAMSMOKE' /tmp/taf-pfam-scan-smoke/result.txt >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-pfam-scan-json && pfam_scan.pl -fasta /opt/pfam_scan/test-fixtures/query.fa -dir /opt/pfam_scan/test-fixtures/pfamdb -cpu 1 -json pretty >/tmp/taf-pfam-scan-json/result.json 2>/tmp/taf-pfam-scan-json/run.log && test -s /tmp/taf-pfam-scan-json/result.json && grep -F 'smoke_gene' /tmp/taf-pfam-scan-json/result.json >/dev/null && grep -F 'PF99999.1' /tmp/taf-pfam-scan-json/result.json >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-pfam-scan-translate && cp /opt/pfam_scan/test-fixtures/query_dna.fa /tmp/taf-pfam-scan-translate/query_dna.fa && pfam_scan.pl -fasta /tmp/taf-pfam-scan-translate/query_dna.fa -dir /opt/pfam_scan/test-fixtures/pfamdb -cpu 1 -translate all -outfile /tmp/taf-pfam-scan-translate/result.txt >/tmp/taf-pfam-scan-translate/run.log 2>&1 && test -s /tmp/taf-pfam-scan-translate/result.txt && test -s /tmp/taf-pfam-scan-translate/query_dna.fa.translated && grep -F 'translate DNA sequence: all' /tmp/taf-pfam-scan-translate/result.txt >/dev/null

upstream.name: PfamScan
upstream.citation: Paysan-Lafosse et al. 2024; Coggill et al. 2008
